settings.title: Company Settings
settings.no_company_selected: No company selected. Select a company from the switcher above.

form.name: Company name
form.name_hint: The display name for your company.
form.description_hint: Optional description shown in the company profile.
form.logo_hint: Upload a PNG, JPEG, WEBP, GIF, or SVG logo image.
form.brand_color_hint: Sets the hue for the company icon. Leave empty for auto-generated color.
form.attachment_limit_error: Enter a whole number from 1 to {{max}}.

hiring.require_approval: Require board approval for new hires
hiring.require_approval_hint: New agent hires stay pending until approved by board.

feedback.allow_sharing: Allow sharing voted AI outputs with Paperclip Labs
feedback.allow_sharing_hint: Only AI-generated outputs you explicitly vote on are eligible for feedback sharing.
feedback.votes_saved_locally: Votes are always saved locally. This setting controls whether voted AI outputs may also be marked for sharing with Paperclip Labs.
feedback.sharing_update_failed: Failed to update feedback sharing setting

openclaw.generate_snippet: Generate an OpenClaw agent invite snippet.
openclaw.generate_snippet_hint: Generates a short-lived OpenClaw agent invite and shows a prompt to copy.

packages.moved_notice: Import and export have moved to dedicated pages accessible from the

danger.archive_notice: Archive this company to hide it from the sidebar. This persists in the database.
danger.confirm_archive: Archive “{{name}}”? It will be hidden from the sidebar.

import.title: Import
import.section_desc: Choose a GitHub repo or upload a local Paperclip zip package.

form.github_url_hint: Repo tree path or blob URL to COMPANY.md (e.g. github.com/owner/repo/tree/main/company).
form.zip_help: Upload a .zip exported directly from Paperclip. Re-zipped archives created by Finder, Explorer, or other zip tools may not import correctly.
form.target_hint: Import into this company or create a new one.
form.new_company_hint: Optional override. Leave blank to use the package name.
form.collision_strategy_hint: Board imports can rename, skip, or replace matching company content.

preview.title: Import preview
preview.select_file: Select a file to preview its contents.

empty.select_company: Select a company to import into.

export.title: Export
export.select_file: Select a file to preview its contents.
export.binary_not_available: Binary asset preview is not available for this file type.

invites.no_company: Select a company to manage invites.
invites.error_no_permission: You do not have permission to manage company invites.
invites.toast_clipboard_unavailable_body: Copy the invite URL manually from the field below.
invites.toast_created_copied: Invite ready below and copied to clipboard.
invites.title: Company Invites
invites.description: Create human invite links for company access. New invite links are copied to your clipboard when they are generated.
invites.create_desc: Generate a human invite link and choose the default access it should request.

roles.viewer_desc: Can view company work and follow along without operational permissions.
roles.operator_desc: Recommended for people who need to help run work without managing access.
roles.admin_desc: Recommended for operators who need to invite people, create agents, and approve joins.
roles.admin_gets: Can create agents, invite users, assign tasks, and approve join requests.
roles.owner_desc: Full company access, including membership and permission management.
roles.owner_gets: Everything in Admin, plus managing members and permission grants.

invites.note: Each invite link is single-use. The first successful use consumes the link and creates or reuses the matching join request before approval.
invites.history_note: Invite history below keeps the audit trail.

latest.title: Latest invite link
latest.note: This URL includes the current Paperclip domain returned by the server.

history.title: Invite history
history.desc: Review invite status, role, inviter, and any linked join request.
history.empty: No invites have been created for this company yet.

skills.title: Skills
skills.source_placeholder: Paste path, GitHub URL, or skills.sh command

dialogs.remove_desc: Remove this skill from the company library. If any agents still use it, removal will be blocked until it is detached.
dialogs.remove_confirm: You are about to remove this skill.
dialogs.detach_to_remove: Detach this skill from all agents to enable removal.
dialogs.add_source_desc: Paste a local path, GitHub URL, or `skills.sh` command into the field first.
dialogs.browse_desc: Find install commands and paste one here.
dialogs.search_desc: Look for repositories with `SKILL.md`, then paste the repo URL here.

empty.select_company: Select a company to manage skills.
empty.no_skills: Select a skill to inspect its files.

toast.created_body: {{name}} is now editable in the Paperclip workspace.
toast.removed_body: {{name}} was removed from the company skill library.

access.title: Company Access
access.description: Manage company user memberships, membership status, and explicit permission grants for {{company}}.
access.no_members: No user memberships found for this company yet.
access.no_company: Select a company to manage access.
access.instance_admin_notice: This account can manage access here through instance-admin privileges, but it does not currently hold an active company membership.
access.humans_desc: Manage human company memberships, status, and grants here.
access.pending_joins_desc: Review human join requests before they become active company members.
access.dialog_description: Update company role, membership status, and explicit grants for {{name}}.
access.grants_desc: Roles provide implicit grants automatically. Explicit grants below are only for overrides and extra access that should persist even if the role changes.
access.implicit_grants_no_role: No role is selected, so this member has no implicit grants right now.
access.implicit_by_role: Included implicitly by the {{role}} role. Add an explicit grant only if it should stay after the role changes.
access.error_no_permission: You do not have permission to manage company members.
access.remove_member_description: Archive {{name}} and move active assignments before hiding this user from assignment fields.

companies.delete_confirm: Delete this company and all its data? This cannot be undone.

join_requests.title: Join Request Queue
join_requests.description: Review human and agent join requests outside the mixed inbox feed.
join_requests.select_company: Select a company to review join requests.
join_requests.no_permission: You do not have permission to review join requests for this company.
join_requests.no_match: No join requests match the current filters.
join_requests.description_extra: This queue uses the same approval mutations as the inline inbox cards.

invite.not_available_desc: This invite may be expired, revoked, or already used.
invite.invite_rejected: This join request was not approved.
invite.invite_used: This invite has already been used.
invite.awaiting_approval: Your request is still awaiting approval.
invite.ask_to_approve: Ask them to visit {{link}} to approve your request.
invite.refresh_after_approved: Refresh this page after you've been approved — you'll be redirected automatically.
invite.you_been_invited: You've been invited to join Paperclip
invite.desc_agent_form: Review the invite details, then submit the agent information below to start the join request.
invite.desc_requires_account: Create your Paperclip account first. If you already have one, switch to sign in and continue the invite with the same email.
invite.desc_ready: Your account is ready. Review the invite details, then accept it to continue.
invite.agent_form_desc: This invite will create an approval request for a new agent in {{company}}.
invite.auth_create_desc: Start with a Paperclip account. After that, you'll come right back here to accept the invite for {{company}}.
invite.auth_sign_in_desc: Use the Paperclip account that already matches this invite. If you do not have one yet, switch back to create account.
invite.auth_fill_fields: Please fill in all required fields.
invite.auth_already_signed_up: Already signed up before? Use the existing-account option instead so the invite lands on the right Paperclip user.
invite.auth_no_account_yet: No account yet? Switch back to create account so you can accept the invite with a new login.
invite.accept_bootstrap_desc: This will finish setting up Paperclip.
invite.accept_company_desc: This will submit or complete your join request for {{company}}.
invite.error_account_exists: An account already exists for {{email}}. Sign in below to continue with this invite.
invite.error_invalid_credentials: That email and password did not match an existing Paperclip account. Check both fields, or create an account first if you are new here.
invite.error_account_may_exist: An account may already exist for {{email}}. Try signing in instead.
invite.error_checking_access: Checking your company access. Try again in a moment.
invite.error_already_member_generic: This account already belongs to the company.

language.title: Language
language.description: Switch the interface language. Takes effect immediately.

new_project_dialog.repo_url_tooltip: Link a GitHub repository so agents can clone, read, and push code for this project.
new_project_dialog.local_folder_tooltip: Set an absolute path on this machine where local agents will read and write files for this project.
new_project_dialog.abs_path_error: Local folder must be a full absolute path.
new_project_dialog.repo_url_error: Repo must use a valid GitHub or GitHub Enterprise repo URL.

project_properties.env_hint: Applied to all runs for issues in this project. Project values override agent env on key conflicts.
project_properties.codebase_help: Repo identifies the source of truth. Local folder is the default place agents write code.
project_properties.legacy_workspaces_note: Additional legacy workspace records exist on this project. Paperclip is using the primary workspace as the codebase view.
project_properties.abs_path_error: Local folder must be a full absolute path.
project_properties.repo_url_error: Repo must use a valid GitHub or GitHub Enterprise repo URL.
project_properties.confirm_clear_local: Clear local folder from this workspace?
project_properties.execution_workspaces_help: Project-owned defaults for isolated issue checkouts and execution workspace behavior.
project_properties.enable_isolated_desc: Let issues choose between the project's primary checkout and an isolated execution workspace.
project_properties.new_issues_isolated: New issues default to isolated checkout
project_properties.new_issues_isolated_desc: If disabled, new issues stay on the project's primary checkout unless someone opts in.
project_properties.worktree_hint: Provision runs inside the derived worktree before agent execution. Teardown is stored here for future cleanup flows.
project_properties.archive_project_desc: Archive this project to hide it from the sidebar and project selectors.
project_properties.unarchive_project_desc: Unarchive this project to restore it in the sidebar and project selectors.

environments.title: Company Environments
environments.description: Define reusable execution targets for projects, issue workspaces, and remote-capable adapters.
environments.no_company: Select a company to manage environments.
environments.disabled_notice: Enable Environments in instance experimental settings to manage company execution targets.
environments.info_matrix: Environment choices use the same adapter support matrix as agent defaults. SSH is always available for remote-managed adapters, and sandbox environments appear only when a run-capable sandbox provider plugin is installed.
environments.no_environments: No environments saved for this company yet.
environments.field_name_hint: Operator-facing name for this execution target.
environments.field_description_hint: Optional note about what this machine is for.
environments.field_driver_hint: Local runs on this host. SSH stores a remote machine target. Sandbox stores plugin-backed provider config on the shared environment seam.
environments.ssh_host_hint: DNS name or IP address for the remote machine.
environments.ssh_workspace_hint: Absolute path that Paperclip will verify during SSH connection tests.
environments.ssh_key_hint: Optional PEM private key. Leave blank to rely on the server's SSH agent or default keychain.
environments.ssh_known_hosts_hint: Optional known_hosts block used when strict host key checking is enabled.
environments.ssh_strict_hint: Keep this on unless you deliberately want probe-time host key acceptance disabled.
environments.sandbox_provider_hint: Installed run-capable sandbox provider plugins appear here.
environments.sandbox_no_config: This provider does not declare additional configuration fields.

budget.paused_project: Execution is paused for this project until the budget is raised or the incident is dismissed.
budget.paused_scope: Heartbeats are paused for this scope until the budget is raised or the incident is dismissed.
budget.error_invalid_amount: Enter a valid non-negative dollar amount.

user_profile.select_company: Select a company to view user profiles.
user_profile.not_found: User profile not found for this company.
user_profile.no_recent_activity: No direct user actions recorded yet.
